narration: Your brain has a limit—overload it, and you forget everything.

narration: This is Cognitive Load Theory. It explains how our working memory handles information.

narration: Too much info? Your brain might just shut down. Imagine trying to learn when your mind's overwhelmed.

narration: Research shows optimal learning happens when cognitive load is balanced. Less is often more.
